title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.280 - Effect of forfeiture of lease
text:
534.280.  Effect of forfeiture of lease. — The determination of any lease by forfeiture shall, within the purview of this chapter, have the same effect as if the term thereby created had expired.
(RSMo 1939 § 2865) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2479; 1919 § 3027; 1909 § 7689
